zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：震荡偏空延续
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD整体处于低位窄幅震荡结构，价格围绕6.86附近整理，短线动能偏弱，市场缺乏明确方向，整体震荡偏空谨慎交易

技术指标方面，MACD持续为负值且动能柱走弱，显示空头略占优势；价格已跌破20日均线6.90，反弹压力明显

下方关键支撑位在6.85附近，若失守或下探6.80区域；上方阻力6.90及6.95，突破需放量确认短期承压

操作建议短线以区间交易为主，未放量突破前不追多，反弹至阻力可分批做空，严格设置止损控制风险等待确认信号

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently exhibiting a tight consolidation with a mild bearish bias after failing to sustain momentum above its short-term average. Price action remains compressed near the lower end of the 24h range, suggesting market indecision but slightly tilted toward sellers. Trading below the 20-period SMA reinforces a cautious outlook. Overall structure indicates sideways-to-soft downside movement rather than a strong directional trend at this stage across intraday timeframes recently observed.

Momentum indicators reinforce the lack of bullish strength. MACD remains in negative territory at -0.0216, signaling persistent downward pressure or weak recovery attempts. With the signal line not provided, confirmation is limited, but price behavior suggests subdued momentum. RSI data is unavailable, yet price stability near lows implies neutral-to-weak conditions. Overall indicators align with consolidation under resistance rather than a reversal-driven advance in current market environment observed today short term.

Immediate support is found near 6.855, closely aligned with the session low of 6.8554, making this a critical short-term floor. A breakdown below this zone could expose 6.80 as the next psychological level. On the upside, resistance sits at 6.88–6.89, corresponding to the intraday high and SMA(20) at 6.89897. A decisive break above this area is required to restore bullish momentum. Otherwise range-bound trading is likely to persist short term conditions.

Cautious trading conditions favor range strategies rather than trend following. Traders may consider buying near support around 6.855–6.85 with tight risk controls, while taking partial profits into the 6.88–6.89 resistance zone. Short positions can be considered on rejection at resistance, provided stops are placed above the SMA(20). A confirmed breakout above 6.90 would shift bias toward renewed bullish continuation. Confirmation requires volume expansion and sustained follow-through above resistance levels observed.
